circularplace.title: CircularPlace
circularplace.description: Startup environment — joined a small team and set up CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Docker Swarm), designed APIs and web interfaces, integrated Stripe for payments and Zitadel for multi-tenant authentication. Code reviews and sprint planning.

experience.title: Experience
experience.circularplace: Startup environment — set up CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Docker Swarm), designed APIs & web interfaces, integrated Stripe for payments and Zitadel for multi-tenant authentication. Code reviews & team supervision.
experience.capency: Managed a team of 4-6 developers in Agile. Integrated Google & Apple Wallet APIs to digitize loyalty cards, built web tools, CI/CD pipelines, managed servers and synchronized with Salesforce.
experience.tractr: Designed and deployed digital products for entrepreneurs, startups & businesses. TypeScript stack (Angular/NestJS), Nx monorepo, AWS CI/CD. Contributed to the Hapify.io CRUD template engine.
experience.hmonster: Developed a SaaS CMS for online courses (B2B/B2C). Upgraded to Laravel 8, redesigned two video-course websites, integrated modules and Stripe payment gateway.
experience.monkeymonk: Internship & apprenticeship (Master's in MIAGE) then full-time at an Agile startup. Built RESTful APIs, company intranet, handled sysadmin & network administration on sports-village.com.
experience.early: Early professional experience: .NET developer & QA at CGI on EDF's nuclear information system (2016), data analyst at BPACA (2017), Symfony developer at APESA (2015).

skills.title: Skills

ai.label: Specialty · AI & Agentic
ai.title: AI Development & Agentic Systems
ai.description: I design and integrate LLM-based systems: autonomous agents, RAG pipelines, Claude API and MCP integration. I build tools that boost developer productivity and automate complex workflows through AI.

skills.description: With over 10 years of experience in web development, I've mastered a comprehensive technology stack spanning modern frontend frameworks, robust backend solutions, and DevOps practices. From startup MVPs to enterprise-scale applications, I bring technical expertise and a passion for building elegant, performant solutions that make a real impact.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Open to exciting opportunities — whether you're building the next big startup or need an experienced developer for your project. Let's discuss how we can work together to bring your vision to life.
